user_report.schema_switcher_layout: Move the schema list to the top control row with the three mode buttons to avoid wasting vertical space.
user_report.luna_pinyin_name: The user expects the luna_pinyin schema to be labeled 朙月拼音 rather than 普通話.

plan_change: Track as M25-DOGFOOD-04.
